title: Hosfelt Gallery
content: ### Favorites. 260 UTAH ST, SAN FRANCISCO | TUE-WED, FRI-SAT 10-5:30; THU 11-7 | 415 495 5454 | Closed: Saturday, 27 June. Large grey works by Jay Defeo in gallery space. Six small paintings by Birgit Jensen hung in straight, horizontal line depicting moon over water. Installation view of Andrew Schoultz exhibition with large red partition mural in center of gallery. Pair of small grey chairs with works by Liliana Porter. Four black and silver chairs and table with works by Jay Defeo. On left, several black and silver subwoofers and cords hang on wall. in the center, "Creature II" a small silver sculpture with screen with purple eye sits on pedestal. Closeup of Salesforce tower displaying work by Jim Campbell. Salesforce tower depicting work resembling Tibetan prayer flags by Jim Campbell. Salesforce Transit center with Terazzo floors by Julie W. Salesforce tower depicting work by Jim Campbell. Tu, W, F & Sa: 10am–5:30pm. ### Your shopping bag.
